results.rendered_html:
māraka (vom caus. von 1. mar)
1〉 adj. (f. mārikā) am Ende eines comp. tödtend: ekādaśamārikā  KATHĀS. 66,77 . 97 . tri˚ 80 . daśa˚ 89 . 95 .
— 2〉 m.
a〉 Seuche, Pestilenz  TRIK. 2,8,60 . der Todesgott  ŚAṂK. _zu_ BṚH. ĀR. UP. S. 316 . zu  CHĀND. UP. S. 50 .
— b〉 Falke  HĀR. 86 .
— Vgl. aśva˚, paśu˚, madhu˚.

results.rendered_html:
māraka a. [mṛ-ṇic ṇvul] (At the end of comp.) Killing, destroying, slaying.
— kaḥ
1 Any pestilential disease, plague, epidemic.
2 The god of love.
3 A murderer, destroyer in general.
4 A hawk.
